title: Green Market Guide | Sustainable Business Notes
description: Green Market Guide shares clear articles for sustainable shops and local brands.
heroTitle: Clear guidance for sustainable local brands
heroSubtitle: A lightweight site template for articles, trust pages, and customer contact.

resolvedArticles.title: Sustainable Branding Without Greenwashing
resolvedArticles.excerpt: How local businesses can communicate sustainability claims with clarity and care.
resolvedArticles.author: Green Market Guide
body: Strong sustainability messaging starts with specific practices, not vague promises. Share what you do, how you measure it, and where you are still improving.
Use plain language and avoid overstating impact. Customers trust brands that show evidence and acknowledge tradeoffs.
Keep claims close to the product or service experience so readers can understand why they matter.

resolvedArticles.title: A Simple Website Launch Checklist
resolvedArticles.excerpt: The essential checks to complete before publishing a new static website.
resolvedArticles.author: Bulk Site Factory
body: Before launch, confirm that the homepage explains the offer clearly, links work, and contact information is easy to find.
Review metadata, page titles, descriptions, sitemap, robots.txt, and analytics settings before pointing your domain to production.
After deployment, test the live domain on desktop and mobile. Keep a short record of what changed so future updates are easier.

resolvedArticles.title: Local SEO Basics for Small Websites
resolvedArticles.excerpt: A short guide to making a local business easier to find in search.
resolvedArticles.author: Bulk Site Factory
body: Start with consistent business details across your homepage, contact page, and directory listings.
Write page titles and descriptions that name the service, audience, and location clearly.
Keep your most important pages linked from the main navigation so visitors and search engines can find them quickly.

resolvedArticles.title: Trust Signals That Help Visitors Decide
resolvedArticles.excerpt: Simple content blocks that make a small website feel credible and useful.
resolvedArticles.author: Bulk Site Factory
body: Trust signals include clear contact details, real examples, transparent claims, useful policies, and recent updates.
Place proof close to important decisions such as booking, contacting, buying, or subscribing.
Avoid vague badges and unsupported claims. Specific evidence is easier for visitors to believe.

resolvedArticles.title: A Lightweight Analytics Foundation
resolvedArticles.excerpt: The basic measurement setup every new content site should have before launch.
resolvedArticles.author: Bulk Site Factory
body: Measure the actions that matter most: visits to key pages, contact clicks, form starts, and completed conversions.
Keep tracking simple at first so the team can trust the data and act on it.
Add a monthly review habit to connect traffic, content quality, and business outcomes.
